description: VERIFIED LIVE: NetEase Cloud Music via your logged-in session (session bridge — no token). Your account, any user's detail, a user's playlists, and listen records work cookie-only on the legacy /api/ paths (no weapi encryption). Tested live by Claude Code against a logged-in session: account, user-detail, playlists and play-record all returned real data.

tools.name: netease_account
tools.description: Your NetEase Music account (id, userName, status). Use the returned id as uid for the other tools. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_user_detail
tools.description: A user's profile detail by uid (level, listenSongs count, nickname). VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_user_playlists
tools.description: A user's playlists (created + favorited) by uid. VERIFIED.

tools.name: netease_play_record
tools.description: A user's listening record by uid. type 1 = last week, 0 = all time. VERIFIED.
